channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: World Cup hiring boost fails to appear
item.description: The latest jobs report showed any gains in leisure and hospitality jobs in May were erased in June, leaving the sector down.

item.title: Kansas City aims to become the Soccer Capital of the World
item.description: Kansas City has invested $700 million over more than a decade to build soccer and sports infrastructure now on public display.

item.title: Trump undercuts GOP midterms message by snubbing housing bill
item.description: In June, Trump called the package the most comprehensive housing legislation in U.S. history.

item.title: Inflation persists amid a perfect storm of El Niño, AI boom, tariffs, fuel crunch, and Ukraine war
item.description: The findings indicate that many businesses continue to adjust prices, even more than a year after tariffs were first imposed.
